channel.title: AI Security on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in AI Security on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001): AI Governance, Risk, and Compliance
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "AI Governance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Responsible AI" , "AI Ethics" , "AI Security" , "CY0-001" , "NIST AI RMF" , "EU AI Act"
item.description: Master AI governance, risk, and compliance for the CompTIA SecAI+ CY0-001 exam. Learn AI governance structures, AI roles, responsible AI principles, AI-specific risks, shadow AI, and frameworks like the EU AI Act, OECD, ISO, and NIST AI RMF.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001): AI-assisted Security
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "AI-assisted Security" , "Security Automation" , "Threat Detection" , "Deepfakes" , "Offensive AI" , "AI Security" , "CY0-001" , "SOAR" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master AI-assisted security for the CompTIA SecAI+ CY0-001 exam. Learn AI-enabled security tools, defensive use cases, security automation, CI/CD integration, and how attackers weaponize AI for deepfakes, social engineering, and automated attack generation.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001): Basic AI Concepts Related to Cybersecurity
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "AI Concepts" , "Machine Learning" , "Deep Learning" , "Large Language Models" , "Generative AI" , "Data Management" , "AI Security" , "CY0-001" , "Artificial Intelligence"
item.description: Master basic AI concepts for the CompTIA SecAI+ CY0-001 exam. Learn machine learning, deep learning, transformers, language models, prompt engineering, model optimization, data security, RAG, and the secure AI lifecycle.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001): Securing AI Systems
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "Securing AI Systems" , "Adversarial Machine Learning" , "LLM Security" , "AI Threats" , "MITRE ATLAS" , "OWASP" , "AI Security" , "CY0-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master securing AI systems for the CompTIA SecAI+ CY0-001 exam. Learn AI threat-modeling frameworks, model and gateway controls, access controls, data protection, monitoring and auditing, and defenses against adversarial attacks like prompt injection and model poisoning.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the CY0-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "CY0-001 Certification" , "AI Security" , "Machine Learning Security" , "LLM Security" , "AI Governance Risk Compliance" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Artificial Intelligence" , "Adversarial Machine Learning" , "Responsible AI"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001) study course covering basic AI concepts, securing AI systems, AI-assisted security, and AI governance, risk, and compliance for cybersecurity practitioners.

item.title: CompTIA SecurityX (CAS-005): Governance, Risk, and Compliance
item.category: "CompTIA SecurityX Course" , "Governance Risk Compliance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Threat Modeling" , "Security Governance" , "CASP+" , "Enterprise Security" , "AI Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master governance, risk, and compliance for the CompTIA SecurityX CAS-005 exam. Learn security program documentation, risk management, third-party risk, compliance frameworks, threat modeling, and AI security.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001) Practice Test - SimeonOnSecurity
item.description: Prepare for the CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001) exam with our comprehensive practice test. Test your knowledge of basic AI concepts, securing AI systems, AI-assisted security, and AI governance, risk, and compliance.
